summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3 arbitrage system testing. 31/32 tests passed (96.9% success). All critical arbitrage features working correctly including scanner, execution, risk controls, and persistence.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 400 when engine already running instead of idempotent behavior
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - expected behavior but could be more user-friendly

passed_tests: Arb scanner health check (running, scanning 102 pairs)
Unique condition_id creation for test opportunities
Opportunity detection with net_edge (657.4bps), confidence (0.75), fees (32.6bps)
Execution system with YES+NO fills and realized edge (691bps)
Positions populated with market_question and outcome context
Arb trades populated with market_question and outcome context
Risk engine blocking with max_order_size=1 (3 risk rejections)
Kill switch blocking arb executions (4 kill switch rejections)
Clean engine shutdown and status verification
action_item_for_main_agent: No critical action items. Consider making POST /api/engine/start idempotent to return 200 when already running instead of 400, but this is minor UX improvement only.
success_percentage: backend: 96.9% (31/32 tests passed), frontend: N/A (backend only testing)
